Accueil/Stratégie/Tower Crush

Tower Crush

Stratégie4.844k parties jouées
Plein écran

Tower Crush is an epic indie game where you build 1 tower, up to 6 floors, load them with weapons, upgrade, evolve and defeat your opponents in fantastic battles. A combination of action and strategy! Don't fear, you’ll collect Machine Guns, Cannons, Flame Guns, Bomb Launchers, Shockwaves, Rocket Launchers, Lasers, Teslas, Ice Cannons and Mighty Plasma Cannons to help defend your tower. Unleash the most devastating special powers upon your enemies in this Combat Game.

#classics
